payload.title: Amazon supports nonprofits after Venezuela earthquakes
payload.fact: Amazon is supporting nonprofits on the ground after devastating earthquakes hit northern Venezuela.
supporting_evidence: Amazon is supporting nonprofits on the ground after devastating quakes hit northern Venezuela

payload.title: Amazon joins RAISE US coalition to develop AI workforce
payload.fact: Amazon joined RAISE US as a founding member to help workers prepare for the jobs of tomorrow.
supporting_evidence: Amazon is joining RAISE US as a founding member to help workers prepare for the jobs of tomorrow

payload.title: Amazon announces $48 billion investment in India by 2030
payload.fact: Amazon announced it will invest $48 billion in India by 2030.
supporting_evidence: Amazon announces it will invest $48 billion in India by 2030

payload.title: Amazon digitized 12 million small businesses in India
payload.fact: Since launching in India, Amazon has digitized 12 million small businesses.
supporting_evidence: Since launching in India, Amazon has digitized 12 million small businesses
